  have h₄ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.2; linarith

  have h₆ : y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 = (y / (y - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₃]
  have h₇ : z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = (z / (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₄]

    sq_nonneg (z / (z - 1) - x / (x - 1))]

have h₂ : x * y * z = 1 := h₁
  have h₃ : x ≠ 1 := h₀.1
  have h₄ : y ≠ 1 := h₀.2.1
  have h₅ : z ≠ 1 := h₀.2.2
  have h₆ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₃
  have h₇ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₄
  have h₈ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₅
  field_simp [h₆, h₇, h₈]
  rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x * y - 1), sq_nonneg (x * z - 1), sq_nonneg (y * z - 1),
    sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (x - z), sq_nonneg (y - z),
    mul_self_nonneg (x * y * z - 1)]

have h₂ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.1; linarith
  have h₃ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.1; linarith
  have h₄ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.2; linarith
  have h₅ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 = (x / (x - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₂]
  have h₆ : y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 = (y / (y - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₃]
  have h₇ : z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = (z / (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₄]
  rw [h₅, h₆, h₇]
  have h₈ : x / (x - 1) + y / (y - 1) + z / (z - 1) = 1 := by
    field_simp [h₂, h₃, h₄]
    nlinarith [h₁]
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x / (x - 1) - y / (y - 1)),
    sq_nonneg (y / (y - 1) - z / (z - 1)),
    sq_nonneg (z / (z - 1) - x / (x - 1))]

have h₂ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.1; linarith
  have h₃ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.1; linarith
  have h₄ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.2; linarith
  have h₅ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 = (x / (x - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₂]
  have h₆ : y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 = (y / (y - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₃]
  have h₇ : z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = (z / (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₄]
  rw [h₅, h₆, h₇]
  have h₈ : x / (x - 1) + y / (y - 1) + z / (z - 1) = 1 + x / (x - 1) + y / (y - 1) + z / (z - 1) - 1 := by ring
  have h₉ : x / (x - 1) = 1 + 1 / (x - 1) := by field_simp; ring
  have h₁₀ : y / (y - 1) = 1 + 1 / (y - 1) := by field_simp; ring
  have h₁₁ : z / (z - 1) = 1 + 1 / (z - 1) := by field_simp; ring
  rw [h₉, h₁₀, h₁₁]
  have h₁₂ : 1 / (x - 1) + 1 / (y - 1) + 1 / (z - 1) = (x * y + y * z + z * x - 3) / (x * y * z - x * y - y * z - z * x + x + y + z - 1) := by
    field_simp [h₂, h₃, h₄]
    ring
  have h₁₃ : x * y * z = 1 := h₁
  have h₁₄ : (x / (x - 1)) ^ 2 + (y / (y - 1)) ^ 2 + (z / (z - 1)) ^ 2 ≥ 1 := by
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x / (x - 1) + y / (y - 1) + z / (z - 1) - 1),
      sq_nonneg (x / (x - 1) - y / (y - 1)),
      sq_nonneg (y / (y - 1) - z / (z - 1)),
      sq_nonneg (z / (z - 1) - x / (x - 1))]
  exact h₁₄

have h₂ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.1; linarith
  have h₃ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.1; linarith
  have h₄ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.2; linarith
  have h₅ : x ^ 2 / (x - 1) ^ 2 = (x / (x - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₂]
  have h₆ : y ^ 2 / (y - 1) ^ 2 = (y / (y - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₃]
  have h₇ : z ^ 2 / (z - 1) ^ 2 = (z / (z - 1)) ^ 2 := by field_simp [h₄]

  have h₈ : x / (x - 1) + y / (y - 1) + z / (z - 1) = 1 := by
    field_simp [h₂, h₃, h₄]
    nlinarith [h₁]
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x / (x - 1) - y / (y - 1)),
    sq_nonneg (y / (y - 1) - z / (z - 1)),
    sq_nonneg (z / (z - 1) - x / (x - 1))]

  have h₃ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.1; linarith

have h₂ : x ≠ 1 := h₀.1
  have h₃ : y ≠ 1 := h₀.2.1

  have h₅ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₂
  have h₆ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₃
  have h₇ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr h₄
  have h₈ : (x - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₅
  have h₉ : (y - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₆
  have h₁₀ : (z - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₇

  rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x * y - 1), sq_nonneg (x * z - 1), sq_nonneg (y * z - 1),

  have h₃ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.1; linarith

    apply sq_pos_of_ne_zero
    intro h
    apply h₀.1
    linarith
  have h₃ : (y - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := by

  have h₁₀ : (z - 1) ^ 2 > 0 := sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₇

    sq_nonneg (y * z - 1), sq_nonneg (y - z), h₁]

have h₂ : (x - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.1; linarith
  have h₃ : (y - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.1; linarith
  have h₄ : (z - 1) ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply h₀.2.2; linarith
